liquibase.servicelocator

Interface ServiceLocator

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Plugin
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    StandardServiceLocator

    public interface ServiceLocator
extends Plugin
    Abstraction for finding and creating instances of classes. StandardServiceLocator is the main implementation, but can be overridden if need be. The ServiceLocator to use should be accessed via Scope.getServiceLocator()

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface liquibase.plugin.Plugin

        PRIORITY_DEFAULT, PRIORITY_NOT_APPLICABLE, PRIORITY_SPECIALIZED

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods

      int getPriority()

      • getPriority

        int getPriority()

      • findInstances

                   throws ServiceNotFoundException
